creator: zlei@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Olivier Cochard from comment #0)
I thinks it works as intended.

For epair(4), rename on create seems not useful compared with other cloning interfaces.

As on create always a pair of interfaces are created and you can not simply rename both to the same name (name collision in vnet). But rename only one side you will take caution to find the name of the other side (e).
